input-field.name: apiKey
input-field.label: API Key
API-Schlüssel
input-field.helpText: Your NoPayn API key from the merchant portal (https://manage.nopayn.io/)
Ihr NoPayn API-Schlüssel aus dem Händlerportal (https://manage.nopayn.io/)

input-field.name: enableCreditCard
input-field.label: Credit / Debit Card
Kredit- / Debitkarte
input-field.helpText: Show Credit / Debit Card as a payment option at checkout
Kredit- / Debitkarte als Zahlungsoption an der Kasse anzeigen

input-field.name: enableApplePay
input-field.label: Apple Pay
Apple Pay
input-field.helpText: Show Apple Pay as a payment option at checkout
Apple Pay als Zahlungsoption an der Kasse anzeigen

input-field.name: enableGooglePay
input-field.label: Google Pay
Google Pay
input-field.helpText: Show Google Pay as a payment option at checkout
Google Pay als Zahlungsoption an der Kasse anzeigen

input-field.name: enableVippsMobilePay
input-field.label: Vipps MobilePay
Vipps MobilePay
input-field.helpText: Show Vipps MobilePay as a payment option at checkout
Vipps MobilePay als Zahlungsoption an der Kasse anzeigen
